content.en:
"With so many time goats, they should have god-level time talents, right?"

Ye Tian thought in his heart.

Wow!

He used his talent for copying to shroud the front, enveloping these battle sheep of the hour.

In an instant, the talent of these Time Battle Sheep was presented in front of Ye Tian's eyes.

Arcane Time Talent!

Arcane Time Talent!

Pseudo-arcane time talent!

Top Time Talent!

......

The time talent of the Battle of Time Sheep is uneven, but most of them are arcane-level time talents, and a small number are below the arcane-level time talents.

Suddenly.

The talent of one of the Battle Sheep caught Ye Tian's attention.

【Time Talent: God-level】

Seeing this god-level time talent, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Immediately, he copied this god-level time talent.

Immediately, Ye Tianyuan fled away and did not come into contact with this group of battle sheep.

Anyway, he had already obtained a god-level time talent, and there was no need to provoke this group of time war goats.

After flying for a while, Ye Tian stopped, and then began to fuse the god-level time talent.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian thought in his heart.

Rumble!!!!

The god-level time talent and Ye Tian began to merge.

After enduring the severe pain, Ye Tian finally integrated this god-level time talent into his consciousness.

The time talent had transformed to the god level, and Ye Tian suddenly found that his resistance to this dimensional time world had increased a lot, and he could hold on for a long time.

However, the mutation began!

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian found that not far in front of him, a huge stone gate appeared, and the stone gate was filled with powerful rules of time.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian was shocked, and he was extremely sure that this stone gate was completely different from the stone gate in the Cangyu Realm, it belonged to two stone gates.

"The Lord of the Blue Feather didn't mention this situation at all, could it be that I triggered the hidden condition to make this stone gate appear?"

Ye Tian guessed.

He pondered for a while, and felt that it was because his time talent had been raised to the god level, which triggered the special rules of time in this dimension, thus causing this stone gate to appear.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and entered the stone gate directly.

He guessed that this must involve a real big opportunity, if you don't go in, wouldn't you miss this big opportunity?

Wow!

Ye Tian passed through the stone gate and suddenly found himself in a large hall.

Just as Ye Tian was looking around, a voice sounded: "Time Inheritor, you're here!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian's expression was solemn, and he immediately said, "I don't know who the predecessor is?"

In the next moment, a white light flickered.

Then, an old man appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"I am the Instrument Spirit and Guardian of the Temple of Time, you can call me the Guardian of Time!"

The old man opened his mouth to introduce himself.

"Temple of Time!"

Ye Tian had a preliminary understanding of the environment he was in, and immediately said, "Time Guardian, can you tell me about the situation here?"

"Of course you can!" said the Time Keeper, "It's my job to explain the situation here to the Time Inheritor. The Temple of Time is a mysterious place established by the Lord of Time, located between the rules of cosmic time and the rules of chaotic time, which is at the junction of the universe and chaos. Even the great power of the Lord of Time cannot truly invade the universe, so he can only build a temple of time here, which can extradite the consciousness of the cosmic beings, but it cannot extradite the souls and bodies of the cosmic beings, and even cannot bring any power over, otherwise the origin of the universe will interfere. "

"This place is in the middle of time between the universe and chaos!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had always thought that this was a time dimension world somewhere in the universe, and he also thought that it was built by a powerful being in a certain cosmic era of the universe.

Now, he finally knew the origin of this place, it turned out to be built by a strong man in the chaos.

"That's right, only the strong in the chaos have such great power, and the supreme in the universe has no such power at all. The Lord of Cangyu is the Supreme, and he is also the Time Supreme, but he doesn't know anything about this place, and he can't control this place, this is obviously not something that the Supreme can do!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

According to Ye Tian's speculation, the strength of this Time Venerable Lord is definitely far beyond that of the Transcendent, as for who is stronger and who is weaker than the original owner of the Golden Desolate Palace, the Old Man of the Golden Desolation, it is impossible to judge.

But there is no doubt that the Golden Desolate Old Man and the Time Venerable are definitely not weak people in the chaos.

......

While Ye Tian was in shock, the Time Guardian continued to narrate: "The Temple of Time is just an experiment done by the master, although it is an experiment, there is still an ordinary inheritance left by the master here. Of course, in your universe, this ordinary inheritance is enough to be called an incomparably anti-heaven inheritance. "

"Keeper of Time, do I have any hope of getting the legacy?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" said the Time Guardian, "All those who can come to the Temple of Time will have the hope of obtaining the inheritance left by the Time Lord. Time Inheritor, the assessment will start soon, please get ready!"

"I'm ready!"

Ye Tianying said.

The Time Guardian said: "There is no need to be nervous, this assessment is a bit special, different from the general assessment, in fact, it can be regarded as accepting the inheritance, mainly depending on the degree to which you accept the inheritance." If you can't withstand the assessment of the lineage, it is equivalent to a failure of the assessment, and the content of the lineage will be erased from your consciousness. If you pass the inheritance assessment, then the inheritance will be completely yours!"

After listening to the words of the Time Guardian, Ye Tian somewhat understood.

Wow!

The Time Guardian waved his hand and let Ye Tian enter the inheritance space.

In the void space, Ye Tian stood there, silently waiting for the arrival of the assessment.

Rumble!!!!

A huge book appeared in the void, and the book slowly opened.

Then, black characters flew out of the books and rushed towards Ye Tian.

Immediately, the first word entered Ye Tian's consciousness.

"Time Chapter Part 1!"

One word after another poured into Ye Tian's consciousness, making Ye Tian have a headache.

This is not a simple font, each word contains the power of time and mysteries, these words are not simple, equal to the inheritance itself.

As more and more words poured in, the more pain Ye Tian endured.

Then.

The words of the Time Keeper came.

"Don't rush to inherit the inheritance, you need to learn to understand, and the more you understand, the less pain you will endure!" said the Time Keeper.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian was somewhat enlightened.

So, while bearing the inheritance, Ye Tian also consulted the first part of the chapter of time, striving to understand the consciousness of every word, even if he didn't understand, he needed to know a little bit.

And just like that, time passed slowly!
